message:
feat: add --setup flag for full Linux installation

Adds --setup flag that performs complete installation:
1. Installs systemd user service file
2. Enables and starts the service via systemctl
3. Patches shell RC files (.bashrc, .zshrc)

After running --setup, users just need to restart their shell.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
